revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-155

The band of frequencies which is modulated onto or from the carrier in a wideband radio relay system and which is occupied by television, multichannel telephony, telegraphy, or similar signals and any pilot or other associated signals.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}
